prompt: Explain what "meaning" means. Not "the meaning of X" — the concept itself.
response:
Meaning can refer to the message, thought, feeling or idea that is intended to be or actually is expressed or conveyed by a person, action, or artistic work. It is the significance or purpose ascribed to something. 

For example, when someone speaks or writes, they aim to express an intended meaning to convey a thought or idea to others. Artistic works, symbols, beliefs and concepts can also carry meaning, referring to the intended thought or message the creator wants to communicate through it to the audience.

More generally, "meaning" refers to the interpretation or significance attributed to something - finding meaning in life implies finding a sense of purpose or significance to existence.

So in summary, meaning involves the intended thoughts, feelings or ideas communicated or expressed through language and creative works, as well as the significance or importance an individual perceives or ascribes to things. Let me know if you need any clarification or have additional questions!
